colors.name: cream
colors.role: background — the clearing; every green exists against it

colors.name: loam
colors.role: primary text and the giant 숲 (12:1 on cream)

colors.name: moss
colors.role: accent: wordmark, section numerals, buttons, focus ring, trunk tier (6.2:1)

colors.name: bark
colors.role: secondary text — loam at 72% alpha composited over cream (5.4:1)

colors.name: lichen
colors.role: decorative only: leaves, far grass, coordinates line (1.8:1 — never functional text)

colors.name: sunlight
colors.role: the morning wash behind the hero and the meadow, always at low alpha

colors.name: moss-soft
colors.role: decorative mid-green: alternating leaves, twig tips, the orb's deep edge

colors.name: trunk
colors.role: decorative: L-system branch tier 0 — the bark of the hero tree

colors.name: stem
colors.role: decorative: L-system branch tier 2, between moss and moss-soft

colors.name: under-stem
colors.role: decorative: understory shrub stems (the parallax back layer)

colors.name: field
colors.role: the meadow floor gradient the canvas grass stands on

colors.name: grass-lit
colors.role: decorative: backlit canvas blades (24% of each row)

colors.name: pollen
colors.role: decorative: drifting canvas motes above the grass, 55% alpha

fonts.role: Latin display and italic asides — the wordmark SUP, section titles, the guide's voice
all Hangul and all body text — round, unhurried; the giant 숲 falls through Instrument Serif into it

texture: No overlay texture — light is the texture. A radial sunlight wash (rgba(233,223,168,0.5) from the upper left) breathes over 17s behind the hero; the meadow section fades cream → sunlight 28% → field green as a vertical gradient; everything else is hairline rules at rgba(74,93,58,0.25) and negative space.

motion.name: ease-forest
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.22, 0.8, 0.24, 1) — reveals: quick to move, very long to settle

motion.name: reveal
motion.value: 950ms ease-forest, translateY(20px) → 0, 110ms stagger per observer batch

motion.name: growth intro
motion.value: cubic ease-out to 74% grown over 5.2s; scroll raises the last 26% within 0.85 viewport

motion.name: growth lerp
motion.value: 0.06 per 60fps-normalized frame toward the intro+scroll target

motion.name: branch window
motion.value: stroke-dashoffset = clamp(0, (t1 − grow) / (t1 − t0), 1.02) per branch, pathLength normalized to 1

motion.name: leaf unfurl
motion.value: opacity and scale = clamp(0, (grow − t) × 12, 1) — each leaf pops open in ~8% of the clock

motion.name: breath cycle
motion.value: 4s in (half-sine), 4s hold, 4s out; orb scale 0.76 + 0.3·breath, halo 0.94 + 0.36·breath

motion.name: blade spring
motion.value: stiffness 0.03–0.06, damping 0.88–0.93 per frame — bends fast, recovers with one soft overshoot

motion.name: wind field
motion.value: 96-cell 1-D field; pointer velocity deposits gaussian impulses; diffusion 0.22/frame, decay 0.945/frame

motion.name: ambient breeze
motion.value: three sines at unrelated rates + a traveling gust every ~33s, gated by a 0.19 rad/s amplitude sine

motion.name: pointer drift
motion.value: parallax lerp 0.05/frame; shrub −7px, tree +12px, copy −4px at full deflection

motion.name: idle sway
motion.value: rotate ±0.5° about the root; 9.4s tree, 12.7s shrub, 17s sun — mutually prime, never loops visibly
